title: WaterInput
description: Normalized input for computing strike water, sparge water, pre-boil and post-boil volumes for a brew session. Decoupled from BeerJSON: an adapter extracts these fields from a Recipe + Equipment profile.

batch_size_l.description: Target finished volume into the fermenter (cooled), in liters.

total_grain_kg.description: Total dry weight of fermentables that participate in the mash (kg).

mash_thickness_l_per_kg.description: Liters of strike water per kg of grain. Typical: 2.5-3.5 L/kg.

grain_absorption_l_per_kg.description: Liters of water absorbed per kg of grain. Typical: 0.8-1.0 L/kg.

mash_dead_space_l.description: Volume left behind in the mash tun after lautering (liters).

kettle_dead_space_l.description: Volume left behind in the boil kettle after transfer (liters).

post_boil_shrinkage_pct.description: Volume reduction percent from boiling temperature to room temperature.

kettle_to_fermenter_loss_l.description: Volume lost transferring from the boil kettle to the fermenter (liters).
